stemHtml: Just before departure, a cargo aircraft receives a large piece of cargo which is placed far forward in the forward most cargo hold. After making sure the CG remains within limits, the crew must now set the trim for take-off. The trim should be set further...

options.a: forward, with the stabiliser leading edge raised.
options.b: forward, with the stabiliser leading edge down.
options.c: aft, with the stabiliser leading edge down.
options.d: aft, with the stabiliser leading edge raised.
